post_hoc_scope_disclosure: The NDX base parameters were selected after inspecting 2018-2023 in the parent screen. Consequently 2018-2023 is research only, 2024 is the next untouched validation year, and 2025 remains the final candidate-specific holdout.

feature_contract.peer_gap_atr: Peer session open minus the prior completed peer-session close, divided by peer ATR56 measured on the final completed opening-window bar.
feature_contract.peer_impulse_atr: Peer completed four-bar opening-window close minus peer session open, divided by the same peer ATR56.
feature_contract.causality: All peer features use only bars completed by the frozen NDX decision time. Entry remains the next M15 bar open.
feature_contract.missing_peer_data: Reject the trade for every non-control filter.

research_survivor_rule: A non-control filter must have at least 200 research trades, pooled PF strictly above raw control, at least four positive research years, and worst annual PF at least 0.90.
selection_rule: Select once by highest worst annual PF, then pooled PF, then trade count.
validation_open_rule: Open 2024 only for the frozen research survivor; require at least 40 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.
holdout_open_rule: Open 2025 once only if the same frozen filter passes 2024; require at least 40 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.
label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
